name: Lirael Veythari
sd_appearance: tall, lithe elf frame draped in jade-green silk robes patterned with coiled serpents, their scales shimmering like wet obsidian under the Dome’s flickering neon, her gold eyes glinting beneath a hooded cowl, fingers gripping a rusted mace while a faintly glowing holy symbol of intertwined serpents rests against her collarbone, one hand clutching a satchel of illicit trinkets as her iridescent skin pulses with the faint hum of hidden contract seals etched into her wrist.
faction_visual: jade green and black divine silk robes, coiled serpent motif, contract seals as pendants
style_note: faction's divine colours, symbol prominently displayed
